channel.title: Todo on Draconian Overlord
channel.description: Recent content in Todo on Draconian Overlord

item.title: Politely Refactoring Code
item.description: I just read Bob Martin’s Clean Coder and really enjoyed it. (Thanks, Blaine, for the book recommendation!) There are quite a few “back in the day” stories, but I overall liked and enjoyed Bob’s points about professionalism in software development. He also makes a very convincing case for TDD, which I had generally considered myself a practitioner of. But after reading Bob’s book, sheesh, I’m an amateur, as I frequently violate the “3 rules” of TDD.
